LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FREDERICK BOWLES' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF POST A $30,000.00 UNDERTAKING BY MARCH 12, 2010. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AS TO THE MONTHLY PAYMENT REVERTING TO THE PRE-DEFAULT LEVEL AND HAS SHOWN IRREPARABLE INJURY. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-23-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
